'''nashofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickum|nickum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickum|nickum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nashofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næshefeth|næshefeth]] || [[word:næshefej|næshefej]] || [[word:næshefesh|næshefesh]] || [[word:næshefe|næshefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nashoshofoth|nashoshofoth]] || [[word:nashoshofoj|nashoshofoj]] || [[word:nashoshofosh|nashoshofosh]] || [[word:nashoshofo|nashoshofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nashofoth|nashofoth]] || [[word:nashofoj|nashofoj]] || [[word:nashofosh|nashofosh]] || [[word:nashofo|nashofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nashoffoth|nashoffoth]] || [[word:nashoffoj|nashoffoj]] || [[word:nashoffosh|nashoffosh]] || [[word:nashoffof|nashoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nashofotho|nashofotho]] || [[word:nashofojo|nashofojo]] || [[word:nashofosho|nashofosho]] || [[word:nashofoko|nashofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nashofoth|nashofoth]] || [[word:nashofoj|nashofoj]] || [[word:nashofosh|nashofosh]] || [[word:nashofo|nashofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nashofothol|nashofothol]] || [[word:nashofojol|nashofojol]] || [[word:nashofoshol|nashofoshol]] || [[word:nashofokol|nashofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nashofothotho|nashofothotho]] || [[word:nashofojojo|nashofojojo]] || [[word:nashofoshosho|nashofoshosho]] || [[word:nashofoko|nashofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nashofothon|nashofothon]] || [[word:nashofojon|nashofojon]] || [[word:nashofoshon|nashofoshon]] || [[word:nashofokon|nashofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nashofothoro|nashofothoro]] || [[word:nashofojoro|nashofojoro]] || [[word:nashofoshoro|nashofoshoro]] || [[word:nashofokoro|nashofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
